mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM dev_manufacturer
is_deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM dev_manufacturer WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM dev_manufacturer WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dev_device_model WHERE manufacturer_id = #{manufacturerId}
